title: IR - Talyllyn Tidbits
description: Talyllyn Railway and other 2'3" rolling stock for Immersive Railroading
body:
**This pack only works with the Immersive Railroading mod.** Talyllyn Tidbits adds equipment from the Talyllyn Railway and other 2'3" lines to IR, complete with a custom, accurage gauge.

The pack currently includes:
- No. 1 "Talyllyn"
- No. 3 "Sir Haydn"
- No. 4 "Edward Thomas"
- TR Slate Wagon
- TR Incline Wagon
- TR Coaches 1-3
